uplink.description: Battery, temperature, humidity, and magnet open (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: TTN example input bytes. Upstream reference decoder yields battery 92, temperature 30.8 C, humidity 50.5 %, magnet_status 'open'; normalized here to vocabulary keys (batteryPercent extra, air.temperature, air.relativeHumidity, action.contactState).

uplink.description: Magnet closed with negative temperature (synthetic, exercises signed LE decode and 'closed' state)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values from the upstream reference decoder (battery 100, temperature -1 C, humidity 45.5 %, magnet_status 'close'). Upstream's 'close' is normalized to the vocabulary enum 'closed'.

uplink.description: History datalog uplink, one prior reading, magnet open (synthetic)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values from the upstream reference decoder (0x20/0xCE history: epoch 1700000000, temperature 23.5 C, humidity 60 %, magnet_status 'open'). Upstream emits a raw `timestamp` (epoch seconds); per AUTHORING.md we normalize it to an RFC3339 `time` and put the prior reading under `history[]`.

uplink.description: Current reading plus one history point (synthetic, exercises top-level + history coexistence)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values from the upstream reference decoder (battery 80, temperature 21 C, humidity 55 %, magnet 'close'; history epoch 1700000000 / temperature 20 C / humidity 50 % / magnet 'open'), normalized to vocabulary keys with the prior reading in `history`.

Synthetic input (channel 0x02 is not a defined EM300-MCS channel). The upstream reference decoder returns an empty object for it; our codec reports an explicit error per the repo's standard, so expected.errors is authored here rather than taken from upstream.
